quote: Throughout your life advance daily, becoming more skillful than yesterday, more skillful than today. This is never-ending.
author: Yamamoto Tsunetomo

quote: Between stimulus and response there is a space. In that space is our power to choose our response. In our response lies our growth and our freedom.
author: Viktor Frankl

quote: Everything can be taken from a man but one thing: the last of the human freedoms — to choose one's attitude in any given set of circumstances, to choose one's own way.
author: Viktor Frankl

quote: Real artists ship.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: The greatest and most important problems of life are all in a certain sense insoluble. They can never be solved, but only outgrown.
author: Carl Jung

quote: Nowhere can man find a quieter or more untroubled retreat than in his own soul.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Difficulties break some men but make others. No axe is sharp enough to cut the soul of a sinner who keeps on trying, one armed with the hope that he will rise even in the end.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Man is condemned to be free; because once thrown into the world, he is responsible for everything he does.
author: Jean-Paul Sartre

quote: Nothing in this world can take the place of persistence. Talent will not; nothing is more common than unsuccessful men with talent. Genius will not; unrewarded genius is almost a proverb. Education will not: the world is full of educated derelicts. Persistence and determination alone are omnipotent.
author: Calvin Coolidge

quote: To dare is to lose one's footing momentarily. Not to dare is to lose oneself.
author: Søren Kierkegaard

quote: Life is a process of becoming, a combination of states we have to go through. Where people fail is that they wish to elect a state and remain in it. This is a kind of death.
author: Anaïs Nin

quote: To subdue the enemy without fighting is the acme of skill.
author: Sun Tzu

quote: Inertia is the death of creativity. You have to stay in the groove.
author: Austin Kleon

quote: Character cannot be developed in ease and quiet. Only through experience of trial and suffering can the soul be strengthened, vision cleared, ambition inspired, and success achieved.
author: Helen Keller

tags: Lifelong Learning / Wisdom / The Examined Life
quote: As long as you live, keep learning how to live.
author: Seneca

quote: Freeing yourself was one thing, claiming ownership of that freed self was another.
author: Toni Morrison

quote: Never mistake activity for achievement.
author: John Wooden

quote: Everything changes and nothing stands still.
author: Heraclitus

quote: If you're going through hell, keep going.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Every action you take is a vote for the type of person you wish to become.
author: James Clear

quote: Fear is a natural reaction to moving closer to the truth.
author: Pema Chödrön

quote: I do not know the way to defeat others, but the way to defeat myself.
author: Yagyū Munenori

quote: Vulnerability is not weakness; it's our greatest measure of courage.
author: Brené Brown

quote: Freedom is not something that anybody can be given; freedom is something people take, and people are as free as they want to be.
author: James Baldwin

quote: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Sell your cleverness and buy bewilderment. Cleverness is mere opinion, bewilderment intuition.
author: Rumi

quote: The secret of life is to fall seven times and to get up eight times.
author: Paulo Coelho
